title: Flatten Comments or Disable Replies
excerpt: Is there a way to flatten updates or turn off replies to updates? Sometimes people are replying to an update that is not the most recent and the reply isn’t shown. We’d like a more simple chronological list of the update…

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to flatten updates or turn off replies to updates? Sometimes people are replying to an update that is not the most recent and the reply isn’t shown. We’d like a more simple chronological list of the updates on an item.
